name: Wireless Display
subtitle: iPhone/iPad as a wireless Mac display

apps.name: Wireless Display
apps.subtitle: Wireless extended display for your Mac
apps.localizedDescription: Turn your iPhone or iPad into a wireless extended display for your Mac over Wi-Fi. Run the macOS sender, then connect from here. Alpha.
apps.versionDescription: Disconnect screen is now readable (dims the frozen frame); 3-finger tap shows/hides the HUD; works on Wi-Fi with client isolation (peer-to-peer).

versions.localizedDescription: Disconnect screen is now readable (dims the frozen frame); 3-finger tap shows/hides the HUD; works on Wi-Fi with client isolation (peer-to-peer).
